      POST

      POST

      POST

      POST
    • Express storage and retrieval API

    • Delete Order By Order No

  1. Cabinet Released Api

Get device box list

POST
/api/iot/device/box/list/
Get device box list: https://api.bestwond.com/api/iot/device/box/list/

Request

Query Params

Body Params application/json

Example
{
    "device_number": "2100013075",
    "app_id": "bw_de2767d821f911e",
    "timestamps": 66454255663
}

Request Code Samples

Shell
JavaScript
Java
Swift
Go
PHP
Python
HTTP
C
C#
Objective-C
Ruby
OCaml
Dart
R
Request Request Example
Shell
JavaScript
Java
Swift
curl --location --request POST 'https://api.bestwond.com/api/iot/device/box/list/?sign' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
    "device_number": "2100013075",
    "app_id": "bw_de2767d821f911e",
    "timestamps": 66454255663
}'

Responses

🟢200成功
